summary.lv: Vecākais Site Reliability Engineer/DevOps Ubiquiti, kas pārvalda un automatizē AWS infrastruktūru ar Terraform, veido CI/CD, monitoringu un logging un atbalsta globālās izstrādes komandas, kuru programmatūru izmanto miljoniem cilvēku.
summary.en: Senior Site Reliability Engineer/DevOps at Ubiquiti managing and automating AWS infrastructure with Terraform, building CI/CD, monitoring and logging, and supporting global engineering teams running software used by millions.
